on_boarding_desc_1:
Makeup has the power to transform your
 mood and empowers you to be a more confident person.
on_boarding_desc_2:
We have dedicated set of products and
 routines hand picked for every skin type.
on_boarding_desc_3:
Allow notifications for new makeup &
 cosmetics offers.

. Enter

The password should have at least 
8 characters.
